org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure

Interface Figure

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Comparable<ViewComponent>, PropertyOwner, Selectable, Serializable, ViewComponent
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    BlockFigure, CoercedFigure, ModelObjectFigure<M>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractFigure, AbstractModelObjectFigure, BitmapFigure, BitmapNodeFigure, BlockDecorationFigure, CircleNodeFigure, CoercedBitmapFigure, CoercedTextFigure, DecorationFigure, EdgeFigure, EllipseFigure, EllipseNodeFigure, FSMEndPointFigure, FSMStartPointFigure, FSMStateFigure, FSMTransitionFigure, NodeFigure, PolylineEdgeFigure, PolylineFigure, RectangleFigure, RectangleNodeFigure, RoundRectangleNodeFigure, SegmentEdgeFigure, SquareNodeFigure, TextFigure

    public interface Figure
extends ViewComponent, Selectable
    This interface represents a generic figure.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-fig

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void fitToContent()
      Change the size of this figure to fit its content as best as possible.
      Color getLockFillColor()
      Replies the color used to fill the figure as locked.
      Color getLockOutlineColor()
      Replies the color used to outline the figure as locked.
      Set<ResizeDirection> getResizeDirections()
      Reply the directions this Fig can be resized by the user
      ShadowPainter getShadowPainter()
      Replies the painter that may be used to paint this figure in shadow mode.
      Iterable<? extends SubFigure> getSubFigures()
      Replies the sub figures.
      Map<String,Class<?>> getUIEditableProperties()
      Replies the definitions of the properties that may be edited through an UI.
      boolean isAssociatedFiguresAutoLocked()
      Reply the lock-state of the associated figures is automatically updated when the lock-state of this figure changed.
      boolean isLockable()
      Replies if this figure accept to be locked.
      boolean isLocked()
      Reply the lock-state of this Fig.
      boolean isMovable()
      Replies if the figure accept to be moved.
      boolean isResizable()
      Reply true if this Fig can be resized by the user
      void setAssociatedFiguresAutoLocked(boolean autoLock)
      Set if the lock-state of the associated figures is automatically updated when the lock-state of this figure changed.
      void setFillColor(Color color)
      Set the color of the filled areas.
      void setLineColor(Color color)
      Set the color of the lines.
      void setLocked(boolean lock)
      Set the lock-state of this Fig.
      void setLockFillColor(Color color)
      Set the color used to fill the figure as locked.
      void setLockOutlineColor(Color color)
      Set the color used to outline the figure as locked.
      void setResizeAllDirections()
      Set the directions the figure can be resized by the user to all the available directions.
      void setResizeDirections(ResizeDirection... resizeDirections)
      Set the directions the figure can be resized by the user

      • Methods inherited from interface org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.view.ViewComponent

        addAssociatedFigureIntoView, addViewComponentChangeListener, addViewComponentPropertyChangeListener, addViewComponentRepaintListener, cleanUp, contains, contains, getAssociatedFigureInView, getAssociatedFiguresInView, getBackgroundColor, getBackgroundSelectionColor, getBounds, getClip, getFillColor, getForegroundSelectionColor, getHeight, getIcon, getLineColor, getLocation, getMaximalDimension, getMaximalHeight, getMaximalWidth, getMetamodelSpecification, getMinimalDimension, getMinimalHeight, getMinimalWidth, getName, getShadowColor, getSize, getUUID, getViewUUID, getWidth, getX, getY, intersects, paint, removeAssociatedFigureFromView, removeViewComponentChangeListener, removeViewComponentPropertyChangeListener, removeViewComponentRepaintListener, repaint, setBounds, setBounds, setHeight, setIcon, setLocation, setMaximalDimension, setMaximalDimension, setMaximalHeight, setMaximalWidth, setMinimalDimension, setMinimalDimension, setMinimalHeight, setMinimalWidth, setName, setSize, setUUID, setViewComponentContainer, setViewUUID, setWidth, translate

        compareTo

      • Methods inherited from interface org.arakhne.afc.util.PropertyOwner

        getProperties, setProperties

      • Methods inherited from interface org.arakhne.afc.ui.selection.Selectable

        isSelectable, setSelectable

    • Method Detail

      • getShadowPainter

        ShadowPainter getShadowPainter()
        Replies the painter that may be used to paint this figure in shadow mode. You must call ShadowPainter.release() when you have finished to paint the figure in shadow mode.
        Returns:
        the painter, never null

      • setLineColor

        void setLineColor(Color color)
        Set the color of the lines.
        Parameters:
        color - is the color of the lines.

      • setFillColor

        void setFillColor(Color color)
        Set the color of the filled areas.
        Parameters:
        color - is the color of the filled areas.

      • getResizeDirections

        Set<ResizeDirection> getResizeDirections()
        Reply the directions this Fig can be resized by the user
        Returns:
        the directions

      • setResizeDirections

        void setResizeDirections(ResizeDirection... resizeDirections)
        Set the directions the figure can be resized by the user
        Parameters:
        resizeDirections - the new directions. If none was given, the shape cannot be resized.

      • setResizeAllDirections

        void setResizeAllDirections()
        Set the directions the figure can be resized by the user to all the available directions.

      • isResizable

        boolean isResizable()
        Reply true if this Fig can be resized by the user
        Returns:
        true if this Fig can be resized, false otherwise.

      • isMovable

        boolean isMovable()
        Replies if the figure accept to be moved.
        Returns:
        true if the figure accept to be moved; Otherwise false.

      • isLockable

        boolean isLockable()
        Replies if this figure accept to be locked.
        Returns:
        true if the figure accept to be locked; otherwise false.

      • setLocked

        void setLocked(boolean lock)
        Set the lock-state of this Fig. When a Fig is locked, it should not be moved by the user.
        Parameters:
        lock - true if this Fig is locked.

      • isLocked

        boolean isLocked()
        Reply the lock-state of this Fig. When a Fig is locked, it should not be moved by the user.
        Returns:
        true if this Fig is locked.

      • isAssociatedFiguresAutoLocked

        boolean isAssociatedFiguresAutoLocked()
        Reply the lock-state of the associated figures is automatically updated when the lock-state of this figure changed.
        Returns:
        true if this lock-state of the associated figures changed as the lock-state of this figure change; false otherwise.

      • setAssociatedFiguresAutoLocked

        void setAssociatedFiguresAutoLocked(boolean autoLock)
        Set if the lock-state of the associated figures is automatically updated when the lock-state of this figure changed.
        Parameters:
        autoLock - is true if this lock-state of the associated figures changed as the lock-state of this figure change; false otherwise.

      • getLockOutlineColor

        Color getLockOutlineColor()
        Replies the color used to outline the figure as locked.
        Returns:
        the locking-state color.

      • setLockOutlineColor

        void setLockOutlineColor(Color color)
        Set the color used to outline the figure as locked.
        Parameters:
        color - is the new locking-state color. If null the default value will be used.

      • getLockFillColor

        Color getLockFillColor()
        Replies the color used to fill the figure as locked.
        Returns:
        the locking-state color.

      • setLockFillColor

        void setLockFillColor(Color color)
        Set the color used to fill the figure as locked.
        Parameters:
        color - is the new locking-state color. If null the default value will be used.

      • getSubFigures

        Iterable<? extends SubFigure> getSubFigures()
        Replies the sub figures.
        Returns:
        the sub figures.

      • fitToContent

        void fitToContent()
        Change the size of this figure to fit its content as best as possible.

      • getUIEditableProperties

        Map<String,Class<?>> getUIEditableProperties()
        Replies the definitions of the properties that may be edited through an UI.
        Returns:
        the properties.
